title: Kai Cenat’s brother says he’s quitting college, claims $700k monthly allowance
summary_full: Kai Cenat's brother, Kaleel, has gone viral after claiming he's quitting college and streaming, citing his brother's alleged $5 million monthly earnings and a $700,000 personal allowance. This has ignited a widespread debate online about wealth, ambition, and the value of hard work versus financial security, with opinions sharply divided.
